signal.digest: This schema-valid research block makes each current node key an alias of the other and must fail stable-identity validation.
signal.falsifies_if: The semantic validator accepts aliases that collide with current node keys.

premise.content: Aliases preserve retired keys and cannot name another current node.

claim.content: Mutual current-key aliases make identity resolution cyclic.

negative_space: Does not forbid aliases that name retired keys

must_hold: Aliases resolve to one current node
